author: piracy.ton
description: Child contract for one indexed TON Storage bag

members.name: InvalidBagId
members.description: `bagId` is zero, which is never a valid TON Storage bag hash.

members.name: MetadataTooLarge
members.description: A user-supplied metadata cell exceeds the configured size bounds (M1).

members.name: IndexOutOfRange
members.description: `get_bag_address` was called with an index outside [0, nextBagIndex) (L2).

members.name: NotFromRegistry
members.description: An init message for a fresh BagItem did not come from its registry.

members.name: NotFromUploader
members.description: A DeactivateBag message did not come from the recorded uploader.

members.name: AlreadyInactive
members.description:
A DeactivateBag message was sent to a bag that was already deactivated.
Prevents a double-emit of BagRemovedEvent and bounces the gas value back
to the uploader instead of silently re-doing the no-op.

declarations.name: BagRemovedEvent

fields.name: bagIndex
fields.description: Sequential index of the deactivated bag.

fields.name: removedBy
fields.description: Address that triggered the deactivation (always the uploader).

declarations.description: Emitted by a BagItem when its uploader deactivates it.

declarations.name: BagMetadata

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description, snake-format string cell.

fields.name: bagSize
fields.description: Total bag size in bytes.

fields.name: filesCount
fields.description: Number of files in the bag.

fields.name: files
fields.description: Dictionary cell: file index -> (name, size).

fields.name: pieceSize
fields.description: TON Storage piece size used for transfers.

fields.name: merkleHash
fields.description: Merkle root hash for integrity verification.

fields.name: dirName
fields.description: Root directory name, snake-format string cell.

declarations.description:
TON Storage technical metadata for a bag. Carried as one ref (`Cell<...>`)
inside AddBag, the init params and the on-chain BagItem storage.

declarations.name: DeactivateBag
declarations.description:
Deactivate a bag. Only the recorded uploader may send it.

Opcode 0x44454143 = "DEAC" (DEACtivate).

declarations.name: BagItemMessage
declarations.description:
Union of every internal message a fully initialized BagItem accepts.
(The one-shot init message uses the BagItemInitParams opcode separately.)

declarations.name: BagDataReply

fields.name: isInitialized
fields.description: Whether the bag has been initialized by the registry.

fields.name: bagIndex
fields.description: Sequential registry index (valid in both states).

fields.name: registryAddress
fields.description: Parent registry address (valid in both states).

fields.name: bagId
fields.description: TON Storage bag hash (0 while uninitialized).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Bag display name cell (empty cell while uninitialized).

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category id (0 while uninitialized).

fields.name: uploaderAddress
fields.description: Uploader wallet (none-address while uninitialized).

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Registration time (0 while uninitialized).

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Active status (false while uninitialized).

declarations.description: Identity + status reply for a bag.

declarations.name: StaticDataReply
declarations.description: Static identity: (bagIndex, registryAddress). Valid in both states.

declarations.name: StorageMetadataReply

fields.name: isInitialized
fields.description:
True when the bag is initialized; the remaining fields are sentinels
(empty cells / zeros) when false.

declarations.description: TON Storage technical metadata of the bag.

declarations.name: BagItemDataNotInitialized

fields.name: bagIndex
fields.description: Sequential index assigned by the registry.

fields.name: registryAddress
fields.description: Parent registry address; the only sender allowed to initialize.

declarations.description:
Pre-init shape: what the registry writes into a fresh BagItem's data so the
item's address is deterministically derivable from (code, index, registry).

declarations.name: BagItemDataInitialized

fields.name: bagIndex
fields.description: Sequential index assigned by the registry.

fields.name: registryAddress
fields.description: Parent registry address.

fields.name: bagId
fields.description: TON Storage bag hash.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Bag display name, snake-format string cell.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category id, 0..5.

fields.name: uploaderAddress
fields.description: Wallet that registered the bag; only it may deactivate.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Registration time (Unix seconds).

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Whether the bag is currently active.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: TON Storage technical metadata, one ref.

declarations.description:
Fully initialized shape: written once when the registry's init message is
processed. From then on the storage stays in this variant forever.

declarations.name: BagItemData
declarations.description:
Explicit init-state discriminant. Auto-generated 1-bit `Either` prefix:
  tag 0 -> BagItemDataNotInitialized
  tag 1 -> BagItemDataInitialized

get_methods.name: get_bag_data
get_methods.description: Full identity + status of the bag.

get_methods.name: get_static_data
get_methods.description: Static identity: (bagIndex, registryAddress). Valid in both states.

get_methods.name: get_storage_metadata
get_methods.description: TON Storage technical metadata of the bag.

get_methods.name: is_active
get_methods.description: Whether the bag is currently active. False while uninitialized.

thrown_errors.name: BagError.InvalidBagId
thrown_errors.description: `bagId` is zero, which is never a valid TON Storage bag hash.

thrown_errors.name: BagError.MetadataTooLarge
thrown_errors.description: A user-supplied metadata cell exceeds the configured size bounds (M1).

thrown_errors.name: BagError.IndexOutOfRange
thrown_errors.description: `get_bag_address` was called with an index outside [0, nextBagIndex) (L2).

thrown_errors.name: BagError.NotFromRegistry
thrown_errors.description: An init message for a fresh BagItem did not come from its registry.

thrown_errors.name: BagError.NotFromUploader
thrown_errors.description: A DeactivateBag message did not come from the recorded uploader.

thrown_errors.name: BagError.AlreadyInactive
thrown_errors.description:
A DeactivateBag message was sent to a bag that was already deactivated.
Prevents a double-emit of BagRemovedEvent and bounces the gas value back
to the uploader instead of silently re-doing the no-op.
